name: Creamy Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugars, evaporated milk, and salt in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Slowly bring to a boil and cook to 236°F (soft-ball stage), stirring almost constantly.
3. Remove from heat and cool slightly. Add maple flavoring and nuts; stir until mixture begins to thicken.
4. Drop quickly by tablespoonful onto wax paper or a buttered pan, making patties about 2-1/2 to 3 inches in size.
5. To prevent the candy from hardening while spooning out, set the saucepan over hot water.
6. Makes 15 to 20 pralines.
